title: Valkyrien Skies Copycat Mass Fix
description: Changes the Valkyrien Skies mass of Create copycats to be accurate to their size/consistent with the real blocks
body:
This datapack changes the Valkyrien Skies mass of Create copycats to be accurate to their size or consistent with the mass of real blocks of the same type.

**Note that you will need to restart your _entire game_ after adding the datapack for it to start working. This is a limitation of Valkyrien Skies.**

Supports basic Create copycats, Create: Connected, Create: Copycats+, and even some others.

Check the gallery for some of the mass changes.
